issues: Draft omits Brian Kozak's goal — he scored one, not mentioned in short/long descriptions.
Draft incorrectly implies Czenczek 'added the winning goal' without crediting Kozak's contribution alongside Tomlinson's two goals.

Drafted headline is fabricated/paraphrased rather than reflecting the actual article headline. The OCR shows a CP wire report with no distinct headline — the headline should be left empty or reflect the wire lead.
Dartmouth Fuel Kids are described in the OCR as being from Nova Scotia (not British Columbia — this appears to be an OCR/article error, but the draft should reflect what the article says accurately).
review.correctedDescriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes scored three third-period goals to defeat Pembroke Lumber Kings 4-1 in Centennial Cup roundrobin play, improving to 2-0 in the tournament.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes beat the Pembroke Lumber Kings 4-1 on May 4, 1987, in Humboldt, Saskatchewan, during the Centennial Cup junior-A championship tournament, with three goals coming in the third period. Dave Tomlinson scored twice, while Brian Kozak and Stan Czenczek added one each; Czenczek's goal at 6:35 of the third period proved to be the winner. The victory gave Richmond a 2-0 roundrobin record and a share of first place with the Saskatchewan champions, the Humboldt Broncos. Pembroke Lumber Kings (Ontario) and Dartmouth Fuel Kids fell to 0-2.
review.notes: This is a Canadian Press (CP) wire report with no standalone headline in the OCR — the fabricated headline in the draft should be dropped. The draft also omitted Brian Kozak's goal, which is clearly stated in the OCR. Note that the article was published May 5 but the game was played May 4 (Monday night); date attribution from the filename is the publication date, which is correct.
